'''M'truli''' was a [[Kajain'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kajain'sa'Nikto]] terrorist assisting in the supply of a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] terror net on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. He was captured by [[Omega Squad]] during a [[Traffic Interdiction Operations|TIOPS]] [[Mission to the Corellian-Perlemian Intersection|mission]]. He was later unsuccessfully interrogated by [[Walon Vau]] and executed along with his comrades, [[Farr Orjul]] and [[Gysk]].
